allow: Bash(git -C /Users/liborballaty/LocalProjects/GitHubProjectsDocuments/llm-test-suite add prompt-viewer.js PROMPTS-USED-IN-TESTING.md view-test-prompts.js run-multitier-performance.js)

Bash(git -C /Users/liborballaty/LocalProjects/GitHubProjectsDocuments/llm-test-suite commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Add interactive prompt viewer and testing documentation

New Tools:
- prompt-viewer.js: Interactive CLI tool for viewing and filtering test prompts
  * Filter by run number (1-6, ranges, or all)
  * Filter by standard (GDPR, ISO_27001, etc)
  * Filter by persona (NOVICE, PRACTITIONER, MANAGER, etc)
  * Filter by knowledge type (FACTUAL, PROCEDURAL, SYNTHESIS, etc)
  * Multiple output formats (text, JSON, CSV)
  * Support for both simple prompts (Runs 1-5) and multi-tier prompts (Run 6)

Supporting Files:
- view-test-prompts.js: Simple viewer showing Run 6 prompts with token counts
- run-multitier-performance.js: Performance test execution script
- PROMPTS-USED-IN-TESTING.md: Complete reference documentation of all test prompts

Enables comprehensive prompt analysis across all 6 test runs
with flexible filtering and output options.

Questions: libor@arionetworks.com
EOF
)")
